prompt:
Minimalist ultra-high-resolution travel sketch poster of Omotesando, Tokyo, on clean white sketchbook paper with subtle paper grain texture.

Style: refined pen drawing + loose watercolor sketch. Delicate black ink linework, airy watercolor washes, elegant urban details. Show a calm everyday Omotesando street scene — the iconic zelkova tree-lined avenue, chic boutiques and flagship stores, small stylish cafés, people walking with shopping bags, bicycles, crosswalks, low-rise modern architecture mixed with traditional touches, subtle Japanese signage (Japanese characters on shop signs), fashionable Tokyo pedestrians, soft morning light filtering through the trees.

Spacious editorial composition with generous negative space.

Mood: calm, modern, sophisticated, poetic.

Typography: "[OMOTESANDO]" "Everyday Urban Rhythm"

Premium travel sketch aesthetic, minimal and stylish, ultra-realistic watercolor + ink travel journal style, ultra-high-resolution, 9:16.
